name: Broccoli Stir-Fry with Soba
recipeInstructions:
1. Diagonally slice broccoli into flowers, stalks and all.
2. Heat a small amount of oil in a pan and stir-fry the broccoli in batches.
3. Add sliced scallions, ginger and garlic to the pan while cooking.
4. Serve the stir-fried broccoli as a topping for Japanese soba noodles.
